outfit_info.outfit_description: This ensemble features a vibrant blue striped shirt paired with dark wash wide-leg jeans, creating a balanced and relaxed silhouette. Accessorized with a chic studded shoulder bag, a classic leather belt, comfortable slip-on sneakers, statement earrings, and stylish sunglasses, it embodies effortless summer elegance perfect for a casual outdoor gathering.

model_attributes.body: The model possesses a lean physique, standing confidently with an approachable and relaxed demeanor.
model_attributes.pose: She stands upright, one hand casually slipped into a pocket, looking directly with a serene expression.
model_attributes.background: A sun-drenched outdoor earthen court, possibly a pétanque area, with blurred people and distant stone buildings.

styling_techniques.P01075105: partially unbuttoned, sleeves rolled up, tucked-in

outfit.P01056408: black leather shoulder bag with studs
outfit.P00749634: gold mini hoop earrings with gemstones
